creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
See the screenshot: https://ibb.co/bx7uWT

This is done on Lenovo IdeaPad 320 laptop that has this device:
> # pciconf -lv | grep -A 4 vga
> vgapci0@pci0:0:1:0:    class=0x030000 card=0x39f917aa chip=0x98e41002 rev=0xda hdr=0x00
>   vendor     = 'Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. [AMD/ATI]'
>   device     = 'Stoney [Radeon R2/R3/R4/R5 Graphics]'
